name: build_cost
description: Phase 2 build economy: with starting gold 100 and Treasury cost 40, place 2 Treasuries (80g spent, 20g left), then attempt a 3rd which costs 40 — should be rejected (insufficient funds). Pass = exactly 2 rooms placed, gold == 20.

inputs.note: Treasury 1 placed far from workers (40g, 60 left)
Treasury 2 placed far from workers (40g, 20 left)
